title: MecaNano — Machine Learning for Nanomechanics (Tutorial 1)
description: A hands-on, beginner-first tutorial on machine learning for nanoindentation and materials data: runnable notebooks covering features/PCA, clustering, supervised models and honest evaluation, CNNs and autoencoders, correlative registration and multimodal label transfer, coating/substrate deconvolution, uncertainty quantification, microstructure segmentation, and Bayesian optimization, on public and synthetic datasets. Use of this repository or its data requires citation; see the repository LICENSE for terms.
